# Luan Perosa

> Personal tech blog and portfolio of Luan Perosa Chitto, a Software Engineer. The site collects notes on software engineering — things learned, problems solved, and how systems work under the hood — alongside a portfolio of shipped e-commerce and web projects.

- The blog focuses on hands-on, from-first-principles explanations (Docker internals, the Node.js event loop, etc.).
- Built with Docusaurus and hosted at https://luanperosa.com.

## Blog Posts

- [Hello World — Starting My Blog](https://luanperosa.com/blog/hello-world): Why I'm starting a technical blog — a space for notes from my journey as a software engineer, things I'm learning, and problems I solve along the way.
- [Docker Under the Hood](https://luanperosa.com/blog/docker-under-the-hood): Docker is not a virtual machine — it's a process isolated by the Linux kernel using namespaces and cgroups. A hands-on look at what runs in a container.
- [The Node.js Event Loop — Async on a Single Thread](https://luanperosa.com/blog/nodejs-event-loop): How Node.js handles thousands of concurrent connections on a single thread — a practical walk through the call stack, event loop, and libuv worker pool.

## Pages

- [Blog](https://luanperosa.com/blog): Full list of blog posts, newest first.
- [Portfolio](https://luanperosa.com/portfolio): Selected software projects, including Nestlé Nutre, Motiva, VapeCraft, Frontier, Wheel Pros, Hortifruti & Natural da Terra, Broto (Bank of Brazil), and Elgin.

## Topics

- [Docker](https://luanperosa.com/docker): Posts about Docker and containerization.
- [Node.js](https://luanperosa.com/nodejs): Posts about Node.js and JavaScript.
- [JavaScript](https://luanperosa.com/javascript): Posts about JavaScript and web development.
- [Learning](https://luanperosa.com/learning): Posts about my learning process.
- [Personal](https://luanperosa.com/personal): Personal posts about my journey.

## About

- Author: Luan Perosa Chitto — Software Engineer.
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/luan-perosa
- GitHub: https://github.com/luanperosa
